channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Alabama Shakes @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-30 03:00 → 2026-05-31 03:00 — Alabama Shakes at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Alabama Shakes are known for their powerful live performances and have a strong reputation in the indie rock scene.

item.title: Yellowcard @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-28 02:00 — Yellowcard at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Yellowcard's reunion tour is generating significant buzz, appealing to fans of pop-punk nostalgia.

item.title: The Afghan Whigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-20 02:30 — The Afghan Whigs at The Fillmore. The Afghan Whigs are a critically acclaimed band celebrating their 40th anniversary, making this a must-see for alt-rock fans.

item.title: The Adicts @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-24 03:00 — The Adicts at The Fillmore. Kevin Morby has a strong following and is known for his engaging live shows, appealing to indie and folk rock fans.

item.title: Lagwagon @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-18 02:00 — Lagwagon at The Fillmore. Lagwagon's celebration of 35 years of Fat Wreck Chords is a significant event for punk rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Seven Lions @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-30 02:30 — Seven Lions at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Seven Lions is a prominent figure in electronic music, known for his captivating live performances.

item.title: hemlocke springs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-21 03:00 — hemlocke springs at The Fillmore. Hemlocke Springs is gaining traction with their unique sound and energetic performances.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their dynamic live shows and eclectic sound, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses is recognized for their atmospheric live performances, making their show a highlight for electronic music fans.

item.title: TK from Ling tosite sigure @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-27 03:00 — TK from Ling tosite sigure at The Fillmore. TK from Ling tosite sigure brings a unique sound that appeals to fans of Japanese rock.

item.title: Julien Dore @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-18 02:30 — Julien Dore at Fox Theater - Oakland. The Last Dinner Party is gaining attention with their fresh sound and engaging performances.

item.title: Forrest Frank @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-07-15 02:00 — Forrest Frank at Oakland Arena. For fans of indie pop, this show promises a unique experience with a rising artist.

item.title: Chapterhouse @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-05-29 03:00 — Chapterhouse at August Hall. Dance With The Dead combines electronic and rock elements, promising an exciting live experience.

item.title: The Cab @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-06-03 02:30 — The Cab at August Hall. The Cab's tour is generating interest, particularly among fans of pop rock.

item.title: Børns @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-05-24 05:00 — Børns at Uptown Theatre Napa. BØRNS is known for his vibrant performances and catchy pop sound, making this a fun show to attend.

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-13 01:30 — The Pussycat Dolls at Shoreline Amphitheatre. The Pussycat Dolls' reunion tour is a notable event for pop music fans.

item.title: Bob Dylan @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-14 02:00 — Bob Dylan at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Dylan's legacy and live reputation make his shows a significant event for music lovers.

item.title: Lucy Dacus @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-05-19 03:00 → 2026-05-20 03:00 — Lucy Dacus at The Castro Theatre. Lucy Dacus is a critically acclaimed artist with a strong live reputation, appealing to indie rock fans.
